claim_text: We present a simple approach to determine $t$ from DFT results
receipt_sentence: We present a simple approach to determine $t$ from DFT results that relies on measuring hybridization, projecting hybridized pair orbitals onto constituent frontier orbitals of the interacting molecules, using spatially discretized wavefunctions (``cube files'') rather than analytical representations.

claim_text: Hopping matrix elements can be inferred from the energy level splittings of hybridized frontier orbitals for the interacting pair only in very special cases
receipt_sentence: Hopping matrix elements can be inferred from the energy level splittings of hybridized frontier orbitals for the interacting pair only in very special cases, for which the molecules are chemically identical and symmetrically placed, leading to bonding and antibonding orbitals that are symmetric and antisymmetric combinations of the constituent monomer orbitals.

claim_text: We present a simple and convenient method to compute hopping matrix elements between any pair of nearby small molecules
receipt_sentence: In this work, we present a simple and convenient method to compute hopping matrix elements between any pair of nearby small molecules.

claim_text: Such overlap integrals can in principle be computed analytically from the set of basis function expansion coefficients for the orbitals
receipt_sentence: Such overlap integrals can in principle be computed analytically from the set of basis function expansion coefficients for the orbitals.

claim_text: We have validated this Frontier Orbital Numerical Projection method by repeating published results for scans of {{formula:8ca60173-f755-4269-abbd-f89eff69013c}}  versus separation between two parallel tetracene molecules
receipt_sentence: We have validated this Frontier Orbital Numerical Projection method by repeating published results for scans of {{formula:8ca60173-f755-4269-abbd-f89eff69013c}}  versus separation between two parallel tetracene molecules (for which energy splitting is sufficient to determine {{formula:92bd29eb-8fe7-4ebd-af4d-a78fe1ffd263}} ), and as well for {{formula:ef7bafc1-cfa4-457a-a858-b92154d7abd6}}  versus rotation between two initially parallel ethylene molecules (for which orbital overlaps must be computed to determine {{formula:8a8d9abd-d5e3-4eba-88dd-ece7af63795d}} ); we find good agreement with previous results.

claim_text: We find good agreement with previous results
receipt_sentence: We have validated this Frontier Orbital Numerical Projection method by repeating published results for scans of {{formula:8ca60173-f755-4269-abbd-f89eff69013c}}  versus separation between two parallel tetracene molecules (for which energy splitting is sufficient to determine {{formula:92bd29eb-8fe7-4ebd-af4d-a78fe1ffd263}} ), and as well for {{formula:ef7bafc1-cfa4-457a-a858-b92154d7abd6}}  versus rotation between two initially parallel ethylene molecules (for which orbital overlaps must be computed to determine {{formula:8a8d9abd-d5e3-4eba-88dd-ece7af63795d}} ); we find good agreement with previous results.
